TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carlos Alazraqui kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Carlos Alazraqui, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Carlos Alazraqui htagan beh sa Yonkers,New York. trang laqi musa Concord,California. 1982-1986 kawas mqwas bah California,Sacramento hopa pqwasan biru. Carlos Alazraqui maki sazing kneril laqi,msqun beh Los Angeles. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ¶~ ®arlos~…ē alazraqui kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®arlos~…ē alazraqui, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. qnxan nja ¶~ ®arlos~…ē alazraqui ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa jonkers~…ē,new jork. traŇč laqi mus~…ēa ¶~ ®on ¶~ ®or*, ¶~ ®ali*ornia. ****-**** kawas~…ē mqwas~…ē ő≤ańß ¶~ ®ali*ornia,s~…ēa ¶~ ®ramento ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. ¶~ ®arlos~…ē alazraqui maki s~…ēaziŇč kneril laqi,ms~…ēqun ő≤eńß los~…ē aŇčeles~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: Carlos Alazraqui kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Carlos Alazraqui, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Carlos Alazraqui htagan beh sa Yonkers,New York. trang laqi musa Concord,California. 1982-1986 kawas mqwas bah California,Sacramento hopa pqwasan biru. Carlos Alazraqui maki sazing kneril laqi,msqun beh Los Angeles. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
